commit.message:
Add Void Depths dungeon crawler game systems

Complete game implementation including:
- VoidDepthsConfig: all game constants (weapons, enemies, bosses, loot, upgrades)
- DungeonService: procedural floor generation with connected rooms, corridors, room types
- CombatService: real-time combat, 6 weapon types, 8 enemy types, 5 bosses, AI behaviors
- PlayerService: HP/stamina management, dodge/block, equipment stats, death/revive
- LootService: item generation, rarity system, drops, inventory management
- ShopService: in-run gold shop with dynamic inventory
- ProgressionService: Essence meta-currency, permanent upgrades, weapon unlocks, achievements
- HUDController: health/stamina bars, minimap, gold, floor info, boss bar, damage numbers
- CombatController: attack visuals, input bindings, enemy health bars, dodge effects
- DungeonController: room detection, fog of war, exit portal interaction, transitions
- LootController: drop visuals, inventory UI, equipment management
- ShopController: in-run shop UI for buying/selling
- AtmosphereController: dungeon lighting, fog, top-down camera
- PlatformUtil: cross-platform detection (mobile/PC/console)
- Updated PlayerData template for roguelike progression

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add task to colWidths type in DraggableTaskRow props

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: NaN deadline on dashboard cards due to V3 ABI field misalignment (#27)

The dashboard's getBounty destructuring was using V2 field order
(missing token and prizes fields), causing judgingDeadline to actually
read the prizes array — producing NaN when converted to Number.

Aligned destructuring with V3 ABI: [creator, title, description, token,
totalAmount, prizes, openDeadline, judgingDeadline, slashPercent, status].

Also added NaN/zero guards in formatDeadline for robustness.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix website login for player numbers with leading zeros

Strip leading zeros via parseInt() when comparing entered PIN against
Firebase player_number, so players with 3-digit IDs (e.g., 819) can
log in with their 4-digit PIN (0819).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add authentication, role-based access, user management, and summary chat

- Login system with PBKDF2 password hashing and HMAC-signed session cookies
- Two roles: admin (full access) and user (summary/breakdown/compare only)
- Admin dropdown in navbar for Users, Clients, and Matters management
- Forced password change on account creation and admin password reset
- Password policy: 8+ chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, special character
- Cannot reuse current password when changing
- Follow-up chat on summary page with per-response download
- Remove NetDocuments browse buttons from pages

commit.message:
Add configurable promiscuous mode for network interfaces

Enable promiscuous mode on all network interfaces by default so the
device can observe traffic across the network segment (essential when
connected to a mirror/SPAN port). Configurable via promiscuous_mode
setting in netmon.conf. Applied on init and when new interfaces are
discovered.

commit.message:
feat: GPU-resident tape summary diagnostic for fast per-level gnorm capture (#179)

* feat: GPU-resident tape summary for fast per-level diagnostics (#179)

Adds gpu_tape_forward_summary() that captures d_y_combined L2 norms
during the existing GPU backward pass, eliminating the GPU→CPU param
copy and CPU traced forward that made tape diagnostics ~10x slower.

- Add level_output_gnorms to GpuMAGGrads (gpu_backward.rs)
- Compute d_y_combined norm via grad_norm_sq_cuda kernel per level
- Add upload_memory() on GpuContextState for in-place M restore
- New gpu_tape_forward_summary() PyO3 method on GpuModel
- loop.py auto-selects GPU path when available, falls back to CPU
- CPU tape path preserved for DGD delta / M state deep observability
- Spec: specs/infrastructure/differentiation/04_gpu_tape_summary.md

Verified: GPU and CPU paths produce identical output_grad_norm values,
context properly restored after diagnostic call (loss match confirmed).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address PR #179 review — opt-in gnorm capture, batch guard, spec alignment

- Make collect_output_gnorms opt-in via bool param on gpu_cms_backward
  (zero overhead on training hot path, only active for tape diagnostic)
- Reject batch_size > 1 in gpu_tape_forward_summary until full context
  deep-clone is implemented (slot-0 snapshot would corrupt batched M)
- Align total_blocks definition: spec now says "active levels this step"
  to match implementation
- Add ```text language label to spec diagram block (MD040)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: dynamic scratch buffer size, update spec pseudocode

- Size grad_norm scratch buffer as ceil(bsd/256) instead of hardcoded
  256 — prevents overflow panic at large batch sizes
- Update spec pseudocode to include collect_output_gnorms parameter

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: update spec pseudocode scratch buffer to dynamic sizing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

feat(ops): diagnostics panel with AI analysis and live Realtime feed (#93)

- BullMQ worker on control-plane collects Supabase cross-tenant
  diagnostics (stuck tasks, offline agents), Hetzner VPS status via API,
  and SSH system metrics from every online agent VPS in parallel
- Claude API (claude-opus-4-6) analyzes raw data and returns structured
  recommendations categorized by severity (safe/destructive)

- Safe actions executable from UI: restart_orchestrator, restart_redis,
  reset_stuck_task, clear_bullmq_stalled
- Destructive actions shown with manual-only note

GET /invoices/:id/wire-transfers endpoint in parallel with the invoice,

calls to ensure integer storage and matching.

commit.message:
Fix tax calculation numbering to match official R7 form

Official 令和7年分 numbering: ㉚-㊻ continuous sequence
- ㉜ 配当控除, ㉝ 住宅借入金等特別控除, ㉞ 政党等寄附金等特別控除
- ㉟ 住宅耐震改修特別控除等, ㊱ 差引所得税額, ㊲ 災害減免額
- ㊳ 再差引所得税額, ㊴ 復興特別所得税額, ㊵ 所得税及び復興特別所得税の額
- ㊶-㊻ 外国税額控除等~納める税金/還付される税金

commit.message:
Architecture v2: MPST regime, load-balancing loss, gate fixes, H200 config

Regime layer:
- Add MPST neighbor interaction (causal conv1d over regime logits)
- Tokens influence nearby regime choices, creating coherent segments
- Configurable via neighbor_interaction + neighbor_kernel_size

Loss function (CRITICAL FIX):
- Old regime_loss MINIMIZED entropy → caused regime collapse (24 codes → 1)
- New load-balancing loss (MoE-style) + entropy MAXIMIZATION
- Prevents any single code from dominating
- Enabled via use_load_balance=true in config

Gate improvements:
- Biased initialization (init_bias=-0.5 → gate starts at ~0.38, latent-preferring)
- Branch normalization (LayerNorm on h and z before gating)
- Prevents magnitude mismatch between surface and latent paths

New config: 300m_h200.yaml
- 300M params targeting H200 140GB ($2/hr on Vast.ai)
- batch=16, accum=4, seq_len=2048, 131K tokens/step
- All fixes enabled: MPST, load-balance, gate bias, branch norm
- mamba-ssm CUDA kernels enabled
- temp_end=0.5 (MPST: maintain stochasticity)

All changes backward-compatible with existing configs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Configure Dependabot to use increase versioning strategy (#15)

## Summary
Updated Dependabot configuration to use the `increase` versioning
strategy for npm dependency updates.

## Changes
- Added `versioning-strategy: increase` to the npm package ecosystem
configuration in `.github/dependabot.yml`

## Details
This configuration change instructs Dependabot to increment only the
minimum required version number when updating dependencies, rather than
using other strategies. This helps maintain more conservative version
bumps and reduces the scope of changes in each update.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01GbG8vuzdc8wQPMzKxEoyMg

Add passthrough OAuth strategy and improve auth error handling (#31)

## Summary
This PR adds support for a "passthrough" OAuth strategy that allows
direct token submission without requiring a separate OAuth provider, and
improves HTTP error responses with proper WWW-Authenticate headers.

## Key Changes

- **New Passthrough OAuth Strategy**: Added comprehensive test suite
(`tests/passthrough.rs`) demonstrating a complete OAuth flow where users
submit API tokens directly through an HTML form, including:
- OAuth discovery endpoints for protected resources and authorization
servers
  - Authorization endpoint with HTML form for token submission
  - Token exchange with PKCE validation
  - Proxied MCP requests using the submitted token
  - PKCE verification to reject invalid verifiers

- **Improved Auth Error Handling** (`src/routes/mcp_proxy.rs`):
- Changed `extract_bearer_token()` to return `Option<&str>` instead of
`Result` for cleaner error handling
- Added `unauthorized()` helper function that returns proper HTTP 401
responses with `WWW-Authenticate: Bearer` header
- Updated both `mcp_sse()` and `mcp_post()` handlers to use consistent
error handling patterns
- Changed error return type from `impl IntoResponse` to explicit
`Response` for better type clarity

- **Enhanced Test Coverage** (`tests/mcp_proxy_test.rs`):
- Added assertions to verify `WWW-Authenticate: Bearer` header is
present in 401 responses
- Tests now validate both missing and malformed authorization headers
return proper auth challenge headers

## Implementation Details

The passthrough strategy enables OAuth flows where the authorization
server is the proxy itself, allowing users to authenticate by providing
their credentials directly. The implementation maintains full PKCE
compliance for security and properly remaps authentication headers to
the downstream service's expected format.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01JuR3e6vnz5DBKRC1JzvPgR

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
